text.title: App Store Optimization (ASO) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply App Store Optimization (ASO) end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: research-keywords
step.action: Identify 5-10 candidate keywords with volume + difficulty.

step.name: draft-title-subtitle
step.action: Place top keyword first in title; subtitle reinforces second.

step.name: order-screenshots
step.action: Order first 3 screenshots to communicate value prop in order.

step.name: set-review-trigger
step.action: Tie review prompt to a positive-completion event.
